title: aimeta meta.json (schemaVersion 2)
description: Canonical schema for the JSON document served at GET /meta by an aimeta-enabled kdb+ process. See SPEC.md in the source repo for the prose specification.

schemaVersion.description: Single-integer version of the meta.json shape. Bumped only on breaking changes.

compilerVersion.description: Semver string identifying the build of the aimeta compiler that produced this file. Distinct from schemaVersion: schemaVersion tracks the wire shape, compilerVersion tracks the implementation.

name.description: Process name. Stamped at compile time from the PROCESS_NAME module constant.

host.description: Populated only when the process is running.

port.description: Populated only when the process is running.

compileStatus.description: Present only when init[]'s compile-on-boot path degraded to synthesised Tier-1 metadata. 'failed' means compile errored out (rule violation, parse error, etc.); 'empty' means compile succeeded but emitted no public tables or functions (typically an unannotated source). Absent in normal compile-succeeded-with-content output. Consumers can branch on its presence/value to detect degraded mode and the reason.

warnings.description: Free-form diagnostics stamped alongside compileStatus when the runtime degrades to synthesised Tier-1 output (e.g. the captured compile error or 'no public surface' note). Absent in normal compile-succeeded-with-content output.

private.description: true when the table carries @private; included in meta.json but flagged internal.

reference.description: Vocabulary name when this is an @reference table. Compiler-generated meta.json omits the field for non-reference tables; hand-authored fixtures may use null.

labels.description: Ordered @label column names; present only when reference is set.

sampleData.description: Inline sample rows; field omitted when no @sampleRow.

tags.description: Free-form labels; field omitted when no @tag.

kdbType.description: Single-character q type code (e.g. 's' symbol, 'f' float, 'p' timestamp). Unknown qdoc type names pass through verbatim and surface as a validator warning, so this field is not strictly single-character in degraded cases.

semanticType.description: Vocabulary tag (e.g. 'currency', 'instrument'). Pairs with an @reference table on the same vocabulary.

foreignRef.description: tableName.columnName syntax. Declares an explicit foreign-key edge.

attributes.description: kdb+ column attributes (sorted/unique/parted/grouped). Field omitted when none.

label.description: true when the column is a human-readable label on an @reference table; field omitted otherwise.

keyColumn.description: Name of the @attr:u column on the resolver table.

examples.description: Opaque illustrative call examples. Never executed by the compiler; may include shorthand.
